instruction:
Solve the integral:
$$
\int \left(\frac{ x+4 }{ x-4 } \right)^{\frac{ 3 }{ 2 }} \, dx
$$

Options:
A. C + sqrt((x+4)/(x-4)) * (x-20) - 12 * ln(abs((sqrt(x-4) - sqrt(x+4)) / (sqrt(x-4) + sqrt(x+4))))
B. C + sqrt((x+4)/(x-4)) * (x-21) - 12 * ln(abs((sqrt(x-4) - sqrt(x+4)) / (sqrt(x-4) + sqrt(x+4))))
C. C + sqrt((x+4)/(x-4)) * (x-18) - 12 * ln(abs((sqrt(x-4) - sqrt(x+4)) / (sqrt(x-4) + sqrt(x+4))))
D. C + sqrt((x+4)/(x-4)) * (x-16) - 12 * ln(abs((sqrt(x-4) - sqrt(x+4)) / (sqrt(x-4) + sqrt(x+4))))
E. C + sqrt((x+4)/(x-4)) * (x-25) - 12 * ln(abs((sqrt(x-4) - sqrt(x+4)) / (sqrt(x-4) + sqrt(x+4))))
F. C + sqrt((x+4)/(x-4)) * (x-22) - 12 * ln(abs((sqrt(x-4) - sqrt(x+4)) / (sqrt(x-4) + sqrt(x+4))))
G. C + sqrt((x+4)/(x-4)) * (x-24) - 12 * ln(abs((sqrt(x-4) - sqrt(x+4)) / (sqrt(x-4) + sqrt(x+4))))
H. C + sqrt((x+4)/(x-4)) * (x-19) - 12 * ln(abs((sqrt(x-4) - sqrt(x+4)) / (sqrt(x-4) + sqrt(x+4))))
I. C + sqrt((x+4)/(x-4)) * (x-17) - 12 * ln(abs((sqrt(x-4) - sqrt(x+4)) / (sqrt(x-4) + sqrt(x+4))))
J. C + sqrt((x+4)/(x-4)) * (x-23) - 12 * ln(abs((sqrt(x-4) - sqrt(x+4)) / (sqrt(x-4) + sqrt(x+4))))
